title: T-050 — UI: shifts + line detail + analytics hub + production settings (SCR-08-08/09/10/11)
prompt:
# T-050 — Shifts / Line detail / Analytics hub / Settings UI

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-08-08, SCR-08-09, SCR-08-10, SCR-08-11, MODAL-08-12/13/14/15
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:215-291 (shifts_screen), :393-496 (analytics_screen), :560-649 (settings_screen); new-screens.jsx:212-478 (line_detail); modals.jsx:328-349 (assign_crew_modal), :400-459 (shift_start_modal), :462-519 (shift_end_modal), :522-597 (oee_target_edit_modal)

## Goal
Build the four 2026-04-30-reconciliation surfaces: SCR-08-08 Shifts (crew + handover + sign-off), SCR-08-09 Analytics hub, SCR-08-10 Settings, SCR-08-11 Line detail (status ribbon + OEE mini-dashboard + 6 tabs + SSE live event sidebar). Wires to T-039/T-040 shift actions, T-044 SSE/OEE, T-045 settings.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/production/shifts/page.tsx (RSC) — shifts_screen parity: crew assignment grid filtered by `users.line_certifications` (V-PROD-SHIFT-001), per-line summary cards (KPIs from `shift_kpi_summary`), handover textarea (`shift_handovers`), end-of-shift sign-off checklist; modals AssignCrew/ShiftStart/ShiftEnd as shadcn Dialogs with PIN + V-PROD-SHIFT-002 server-side gate from T-040.
2. apps/web/app/production/lines/[id]/page.tsx (RSC) — line_detail parity: status ribbon, OEE mini-dashboard (3 gauges + composite + 8h sparkline from `oee_snapshots`), 6 tabs via URL param (Today's Output / Yield Rolling 4h / Downtime / OEE / Shift Log / Live Events); Live Events sidebar uses `/api/lines/[id]/events` SSE from T-044 (resolves BL-PROD-01 by querying `lp_outputs` instead of mock).
3. apps/web/app/production/analytics/page.tsx (RSC) — analytics_screen parity: sticky filter bar, 5 KPI cards with period delta + target reference (per §2.4), 6 charts via Recharts, Operator KPIs table from `operator_kpis_monthly` view (Shift Lead+).
4. apps/web/app/production/settings/page.tsx (RSC) — settings_screen parity: 8 accordion sections (per §8.1 SCR-08-10), each form wires to T-045 Server Actions; Prod Manager RBAC guard with disabled inputs + Tooltip for non-PM; MODAL-08-15 OEE Target Edit Dialog with effective-date window (BL-PROD-04 resolved via T-045).
5. Literal `data-prototype-label` markers: `shifts_screen`, `line_detail`, `analytics_screen`, `settings_screen`, `assign_crew_modal`, `shift_start_modal`, `shift_end_modal`, `oee_target_edit_modal`.

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the four surfaces render with prototype-shaped data, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:215-291,393-496,560-649 and new-screens.jsx:212-478, then per-surface parity holds (crew+handover+sign-off for Shifts; status+OEE mini+6 tabs+SSE sidebar for Line; 5 KPI+6 charts+operator KPIs for Analytics; 8 accordion sections for Settings) — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist + visible `data-prototype-label` markers.
2. Given the End-of-Shift sign-off panel has an unresolved gate (open downtime, missing handover, or QA hold), when Shift Lead clicks `[Sign Off Shift]`, then the Dialog returns the typed `unresolved_gates` from T-040 and the action does not persist.
3. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts for shifts, line detail, analytics, settings (incl. OEE Target Edit modal) and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (or documented blocker + RTL/snapshot fallback).

## Test strategy
- RED: apps/web/app/production/__tests__/shifts-lines-analytics-settings.test.tsx + apps/web/components/production/__tests__/shift-modals.test.tsx asserting per-surface parity, SSE wiring, unresolved-gates blocker, Prod Manager RBAC guard, and `data-prototype-label` markers before code exists.
- Run `pnpm vitest run apps/web/app/production/__tests__/shifts-lines-analytics-settings.test.tsx apps/web/components/production/__tests__/shift-modals.test.tsx`
- For UI parity, capture screenshots + Playwright trace; attach paths.
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass V-PROD-SHIFT-001 (line certification) or V-PROD-SHIFT-002 (unresolved gates).
- Do not let non-Prod-Manager users mutate Production Settings (disabled inputs + server-side guard).
- Do not skip BL-PROD-01 fix on Line Detail today's-output (must use `lp_outputs` query).
- Do not store OEE target edits in memory — must use `prod_oee_targets` window from T-045.

pipeline_inputs.description: Shifts + Line detail + Analytics hub + Production Settings surfaces + crew/shift/OEE-target modals; wired to T-039/T-040/T-044/T-045 with RBAC + V-PROD-SHIFT gates.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity per surface: shifts_screen at other-screens.jsx:215-291 (crew assignments + per-line summary + handover + sign-off checklist); line_detail at new-screens.jsx:212-478 (status ribbon + 3-gauge mini-OEE + 8h sparkline + 6 tabs + SSE Live Events sidebar resolving BL-PROD-01); analytics_screen at other-screens.jsx:393-496 (5 KPI + 6 charts + operator_kpis_monthly table); settings_screen at other-screens.jsx:560-649 (8 accordion sections per PRD §8.1 SCR-08-10); modals assign_crew at modals.jsx:328-349, shift_start at :400-459, shift_end at :462-519, oee_target_edit at :522-597. V-PROD-SHIFT-001 (line certification) and V-PROD-SHIFT-002 (unresolved gates) enforced via server actions T-039/T-040. OEE target edit uses prod_oee_targets effective-date window via T-045 (BL-PROD-04 resolution). RBAC: Prod Manager gates settings; non-PM users see disabled inputs + Tooltip. UI closeout includes screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.
out_of_scope: Do not implement DLQ admin UI (T-051)
Do not implement Tweaks Panel (SCR-08-13 flag-gated)
